author: Vincent Voyer
subject: docs(links): make links works by default in dev and prod (algolia/react-instantsearch#1662)
body:
To reuse the state (and state.env in particular) in the slugify option.

- remove the need for publicPath, just use base href
fixes algolia/react-instantsearch#1639

Always link to ressources (html, css, js) by just putting the ressource
path from the base of the website without any leading slash.

Thus "images/test.png" and not publicPath.. nor "/images/test.png".
